ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the stats */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player during the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "fgm_a" TEXT /* Field Goals Made - Attempts */,
  "three_pm_a" TEXT /* Three Point Field Goals Made - Attempts */,
  "ftm_a" TEXT /* Free Throws Made - Attempts */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists to teammates */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers committed */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Player's efficiency rating */,
  "nerd" REAL /* Normalized Efficiency Rating Differential */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_attempt_rate" REAL /* Three point attempt rate */,
  "free_throw_attempt_rate" REAL /* Free throw attempt rate */,
  "offensive_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage */,
  "defensive_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Defensive rebound percentage */,
  "assist_percentage" REAL /* Assist percentage */,
  "steal_percentage" REAL /* Steal percentage */,
  "block_percentage" REAL /* Block percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style (e.g., defensive-minded, fast-paced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "fgm_a" TEXT /* Field Goals Made - Attempts */,
  "three_pm_a" TEXT /* Three Point Field Goals Made - Attempts */,
  "ftm_a" TEXT /* Free Throws Made - Attempts */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists to teammates */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers committed */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contract" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is contracted to */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "guaranteed_salary" REAL /* Guaranteed salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contract_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contract_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain, torn muscle) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, All-Star, Rookie of the Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
